positionList.title: Project Manager
positionList.description: •	Managed projects for web-based trading application used by AIG Advisor Group’s 9000+ Registered Broker/Dealer Reps.  Integrated internal system with Pershing, NetAssetManagement and Albridge to handle separately managed accounts, mutual funds and alternative investments.

positionList.title: Product Manager
positionList.description:
•	Managed product and operations functions for early stage, venture backed commercial mortgage origination and underwriting software suite 
o	Maintained product roadmap, including competitive analysis, positioning and launch strategies 
o	Responsible for online and physical distribution and all customer support requests
•	Acquired over 2,500 customers within a two year period.  Reported to President and Founder.

positionList.title: Program Manager
positionList.description:
•	Implemented project and portfolio management tools for department of 600 users in nine locations across United States, Europe and India.  Created interactive dashboards to communicate request pipeline, project delivery calendars and resource allocation to senior vice presidents.  
•	Maintain systems and processes for prioritization, scheduling and staffing of projects up to $10 million.
•	Administered Salesforce.com for 60 national wholesalers generating $3 billion in annuity and life insurance sales in 2008.

positionList.title: Networking coach
positionList.description:
I teach networking skills to ambitious, successful product managers to help them land roles at top public and private tech companies.
Multiple students have received responses and landed interviews - bypassing application queues - at companies like Meta, Google, Uber, AirBnB, and Walmart using my advice.
Examples:
"Hey David! Good news: Your advice for helping me craft short messages to add to cold connection requests helped me add 4 PM recruiters at Meta. Also got on a call with one of them last week and am now preparing for first round case interviews"
"Hi David, that AirBnB hiring manager finally accepted my LinkedIn invite thanks to your tricks!"
"Your advice to engage with PMs who set their profile to 'Actively hiring' landed me a call with a Walmart hiring manager"

positionList.title: Founder
positionList.description:
Owner
• 2022 to present: Acquired existing camping gear content website business listed on Flippa. Updated Amazon Associates affiliate links and transitioned ad network from Google Adsense to Ezoic. 

Advisor/Investor
• 2011 to present: Advise and invest in start-up internet businesses.
Advisor and investor in EZWebplayer, an innovative video hosting platform that offers encoding, customized video players, and video management for publishing and streaming videos more cost effectively.

Founder
• 2003 - 2004: Founded online classified site for pets. Grew site traffic through search engine optimization, search engine marketing using Google Adwords, and link building. Sourced and installed software at hosting site and coded updates in Javascript and HTML. Achieved profitability through paid listings using Paypal, affiliate links from Linkshare, and Google Adsense. Made nearly $10,000.

Affiliate Revenue Negotiator
• 2001 - 2002: Negotiated 2 year, $150,000 affiliate marketing arrangement with Spiegel Catalog to redirect traffic from my family owned Speigel.com domain name.

positionList.title: Director of Product, Emerging Businesses
positionList.description:
The Strategy and Emerging Businesses team identified, evaluated and developed innovative digital business initiatives. Operating with an entrepreneurial focus, the team sought growth opportunities for Discovery Digital Media to build internally or create through partnerships.

Contributed to presentation that secured internal funding for Curiosity.com which was later spun out into a standalone business.

positionList.title: Head of Product - Distributed Identity
positionList.description:
I led the team that designed, built, and launched a cookieless client side tag (CST) to track MAIDs, CTV-IDs and RampIDs.
- CST product earned $X million in its first year and drives tens of millions in revenue for associated measurement and activation products.
- Managed products from engineering to go-to-market, including leading closed betas with 3 top clients (over $1M/year ACV)
- Reported to VP Product, Identity Resolution. Started managing two engineering teams and took on additional third engineering team and a data operations team. I managed the work of nearly 20 engineers and data analysts.
- Outside of core responsibilities, I collaborated on a cross functional leadership team with LiveRamp's now CPO to establish cross division Product Operations Processes, improving strategic alignment, tracking, and communication. I personally integrated Jira to Productboard to ensure automated alignment of engineering statuses to product roadmaps that rolled up to the executive levels.

positionList.title: Product Management and Business Development
positionList.description:
Managed a team that established and executed roadmaps to build business partnerships and deliver complex audience data integrations with top players: Adobe, Salesforce, Google, Facebook, Twitter, Snapchat, Pinterest, Pandora, Spotify, Verizon Media and others.

These integrations provided the basis for new product offerings from Signal.

positionList.title: Director of Product Management
positionList.description: Partnered with Director and VP of Engineering from Axciom to license 3rd party identity data to build an in house Identity Resolution Graph to power the former IPG Cadreon/Mediabrands Audience Management Platform.

positionList.title: Senior Manager, New Ventures
positionList.description:
Outerwall is the parent company of Redbox.

I served as Head of Technology, New Ventures for Star Studio. I managed all hardware and software for Star Studio, an interactive photo booth kiosk found in 65 malls across Southern California, Texas and the Northeast.

Prepared detailed financial forecasts for costs and revenues to scale from 65 to 350 kiosks. Plans included hardware costs, software costs (staffing), and other capital and operating expenses to support use of investment funds.

positionList.title: Venture Capital Intern
positionList.description:
•	Created market research presentation for cloud computing market.
•	Performed due diligence, validated financials, sourced and evaluated companies for investment.

positionList.title: Product Manager
positionList.description:
•	Managed marketing, development and vendor teams to design, build and launch website and software-download manager used by Microsoft for the Office 12 Beta global release. Product was translated to 5 languages.  Multiple Office products reached 500,000 downloads per day. 
•	Designed a software maintenance renewal process for Computer Associates.  CA increased software renewal percentages from 10% to 30% per quarter – revenue increased from $5 million to $15 million per quarter.
•	Created a web-based software license portal for publicly traded software firms that enabled sales, support and customers to generate and assign product license keys.  Worked closely with sales to acquire first customers, determine pricing and establish product positioning.
•	Customers included Embarcadero Technologies, Macromedia, and Adobe.  Reported to CTO.

all_experiences.companyName: ASAP Software / License Technologies Group (Acquired by Dell)

positionList.title: Sr. Product Manager, Platform
positionList.description:
Sr. Product Manager for the creation of Conversant Access - a customer facing reporting portal:
http://blog.conversantmedia.com/2015/10/08/are-you-in-the-drivers-seat-of-your-data/

Led the creation of Conversant Access, a client facing website providing reporting, ad previewing/approval, and self-serve campaign management for direct to brand and agency clients, including Williams Sonoma, Cabela’s, and Victoria’s Secret.

positionList.title: GTM and AdTech Advisor
positionList.description:
Zocket's mission is to empower businesses of all sizes to effortlessly launch and manage their social media ads with AI.

Zocket leverages cutting-edge AI technologies to simplify the advertising for both small enterprises and large scale business. Our suite of AI modules include:

[1] 𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐒𝐭𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐨: lets you harness the power of AI for stunning ad visual creation helping marketers create stunning ad copies across Facebook, Instagram, Google, Linkedin, Snapchat, Tiktok ads etc. in minutes

[2] 𝐀𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐒𝐭𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐨: Adaptive clustering models to target and engage with the most relevant audience segments across channels

[3] 𝐋𝐚𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐡 𝐌𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫: Centralize your advertising efforts across multiple platforms—including meta, Google, LinkedIn, Snapchat, and more—from a single, streamlined interface

[4] 𝐈𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐬 𝐇𝐮𝐛: Provides analytics, with customizable inputs to ensure your advertising strategies work the way you want them to

[5] 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐦𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐂𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫: Imagine slack for marketing teams! Stay organized and in control with our intuitive command centre helping marketing teams (performance marketers, graphic designers, copy writers, budget managers) operate in a well co-ordinated way

[6] 𝐎𝐩𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐢𝐳𝐞𝐫 𝐋𝐚𝐛: Optimize your campaigns with ease, maximizing ROI and driving impactful results with AI driven rule engine

positionList.title: Head of Product Growth - Influencer Marketing Platform
positionList.description:
Promoted from Principal Product Manager, Brands to Head of Product Growth, Influencer Marketing Platform
- Coordinated a team of 4 product managers, 3 UX designers, 1 product marketing director, and a data analyst to prioritize, design and implement self-serve, Product Led Growth features: online payments, freemium and free trial offers, onboarding flows, pricing plans, packages and pricing page, surveys, feature gating, email campaigns, and renewal reminders.
- Increased self-serve conversions from 0 to 50/month. Generated $XX,000 in recurring brand platform subscription revenue and $XX,000 in brand to creator payments/month
- Conducted user research interviews. Analyzed qualitative and quantitative feedback to prioritize usability enhancements to increase self-serve conversion rates.
- Built dashboards in Trevor, Redash, Pendo, and Google Analytics to monitor and optimize activation and retention
- Participated in numerous AI projects including an AI Brief Builder (LLM agent), AI Studio image enhancement (background removal, scene modification), and an AI voice feature for consumer apps.

positionList.title: Principal Product Manager, Brands
positionList.description: - Gathered feedback from Sales to facilitate and prioritize a retention focused roadmap. Led teams to build new features, retaining two $1M+ ACV brands about to leave. Also brought back an additional $1M+ ACV brand.

positionList.title: Management Consultant
positionList.description: •	Served as Programming Team Lead for Staffware Workflow software at international CRM demo center.  Integrated software with various CRM applications, including Siebel and Nuance.  Presented to Fortune 500 executives.

positionList.title: Deployment Manager
positionList.description:
•	Managed team that implemented Yodlee’s Software Development Kit (SDK) product.  SDK allowed portals like Yahoo!, AOL, MSN and Fortune 50 financial firms like Citibank and Fidelity to integrate Yodlee API’s and offer online account aggregation to their customers.
•	Trained Accenture consultants, establishing new sales and integration channel.
•	Initiated 30 SDK implementations for customers in six countries across four continents.
